title: A precision engineering blueprint: the state-transition arrow drawn on blueprint paper with construction lines and dimension marks. Before any building is constructed, the blueprint establishes the exact specification. Precept works the same way — the .precept file is the blueprint, verified at compile time and enforced as law at runtime.
conceptualBridge: The blueprint arrow means Precept's contract is the precision specification because a blueprint IS the authority from which everything is built — never improvised, already verified, structurally exact.
decision: Shortlisted: avg 4.31, no hard fails — the blueprint engineering drawing is a radical departure in both color (blue bg) and aesthetic tradition; conceptual bridge 'blueprint IS the authority before construction' is strong and specific; unique in the folder; monochrome test slightly weak but compensated by exceptional color/contrast.
